title: 有馬記念の後に・諦念と

text_block_list.text:
Gold City wins against Tamamo Cross. Despite
her victory, the crowd still obsesses over her
appearance rather than her strength.

Conversely, Tamamo Cross is noted for her
running, even though she lost. The difference in
treatment devastates Gold City.

Tamamo Cross is angered by Gold City's gutless
performance and asks her why she runs in the first
place, but Gold City can't find an answer.

When she talks to me, she quietly concedes that
nothing she does will ever change her reputation.
But when asked if she would stop running, she
does nothing to affirm.

Unconvinced that she truly wants to give up, I
decide to register her for the Osaka Hai, with my
eyes now set on the Senior Spring Triple Crown.
